title: Sandbox Graph IR v1.0
description: Frozen v1.0 intermediate representation for Sandbox brick graphs. One graph.json = one brick. Consumed by validateGraph.js (authoring-time T6 rules), compileGraphToWebAudio.js (preview runtime), and Stage-3 master-worklet codegen. Op-specific param constraints live in opRegistry.js — this schema freezes the OUTER shape (nodes/wires/terminals/panel/feedback), not the per-op param surface. Breaking changes to this file bump the schemaVersion major number.

schemaVersion.description: IR schema version. v1.0 was frozen 2026-04-23 alongside the host-owned bypass topology and softLimit op. Consumers MUST check this field and refuse to process unknown majors.

id.description: Stable graph identifier. Globally unique across the sandbox; used by preset files, presets, and codegen-emitted plugin bundles as the canonical name.

label.description: Human-readable brick name shown in canvas / preset lists.

canvas.description: Authoring-canvas viewport hint. Non-normative — purely for the editor.

terminals.description: Graph-level audio I/O. The host wires these to its input/output gain nodes. Every graph must have at least one 'input' and at least one 'output' terminal (enforced by validateGraph, not schema — schema allows 0 to keep sub-graphs / template fragments parseable).

nodes.description: DSP nodes. Each node instantiates one op from opRegistry.js with that op's params bound.

wires.description: Audio/control connections. Endpoints may be either a bare node/terminal id or an explicit '<id>.<port>' reference. Bare ids bind to the op's default input/output port (conventionally 'in' / 'out').

feedback.description: Render-hint list of logical feedback arcs. Does NOT create audio connections — the real audio wiring for a feedback loop lives in 'wires' via an 'fb' port on the destination op. This array exists solely so the canvas can draw a dashed/curved arc for the eye.

legendOps.description: Ordered list of op ids to show in the brick legend. Subset of ops used by 'nodes'. Purely cosmetic.

panel.description: Panel knob bindings. One knob maps to one or more (nodeId, paramId) targets with a range + curve. This is what the plugin UI reads; authoring-time the Orb panel talks to knobs, knobs talk to nodes.

id.description: Stable reference id inside a graph. Alphanumeric + underscore; starts with a letter.

portRef.description: Either '<id>' or '<id>.<port>'. Validator resolves the port.

op.description: Op id from opRegistry.js. Validator verifies existence + aggregates op capabilities.

params.description: Op-specific parameter bindings. The SHAPE of this object is op-dependent — see opRegistry.js for per-op param schemas. validateGraph.js enforces type, range, and enum membership against the registry. In v1.0 every param value is a static literal (number, bool, or enum string). Stage-B of the modulation roadmap will upgrade this to a discriminated-union source descriptor (static | knob | signal | LFO | etc).
